text:
リリーパの砂漠は厳しい環境と
強力な機甲種が徘徊する、危険な場所。
流石のアンタでもきっついわよー？

無理しなくてもいいからね。
もちろん、ダメだったら
「へっぽこぴー」に逆戻りだけど。

いや、この一回で逆戻りも
ちょっとかわいそう……かな？
なんにせよ、頑張りなさいって

The Lillipa Desert is a harsh environment where
powerful Automata roam freely. I'll bet even
YOU get sand in all the wrong places there.

You don't have to stick your neck out too far
on this one. Of course, if you DO back out,
I'm demoting you back to clown status.

Then again, maybe one wuss-out isn't
enough to justify that harsh of a punishment...
Meh, I dunno. Anyway, go get 'em!
